signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Momentum | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Momentum | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

On April 14, 2026, Solana achieved a network milestone with 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, fueling a 10% SOL price surge tied to the **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** targeting 150ms transaction finality (down from 12 seconds)

signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Up from 2.0% but Below Forecasts | NO | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, remaining aligned with the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures before global energy volatility from the Iran conflict.[2][5]
